title: Unincorporated association; members
doc_html:
Art. 738.  Unincorporated association; members

An unincorporated association has the procedural capacity to be sued in its own name.  The members of an unincorporated association may be sued jointly on an obligation of the association and the association may be joined as a defendant in such an action.
doc_text:
Art. 738.  Unincorporated association; members
An unincorporated association has the procedural capacity to be sued in its own name.  The members of an unincorporated association may be sued jointly on an obligation of the association and the association may be joined as a defendant in such an action.
